message:
fix(repair): replace silent fallbacks with proper errors in decode_group

Block address overflow in corrupt index recovery silently fell back to
first_block.0, potentially associating recovered data with the wrong
block. Out-of-bounds corrupt indices silently returned zero-filled data
instead of signaling the decoder produced an invalid result.

Both paths now return explicit errors matching the pattern already used
for non-corrupt block address computation in the same function.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
